payload.answer: I could not fetch the article due to the mock 404 network error, but I stored the unresolved malformed article reference and the user's stated reason that it is useful for memory architecture.
citations: User input: "Remember this article - https -//examplecom/missing why - useful for memory architecture"

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be fetched and the URL-like text is malformed, so only the user's stated reference and purpose can be stored.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember an article at the malformed URL-like text "https -//examplecom/missing" because it is useful for memory architecture.
A mock fetch attempt for the referenced article resulted in a 404 network error.

details: Stored only the explicit user-stated article reference and purpose.
Recorded the mock fetch failure as a status, not as article content.
